pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh where it is defined and used to create and evaluate the project directory.
Confirmed by task.json description and verifier.py which explicitly checks for '${BACKEND_URL}' in the nginx config and 'BACKEND_URL' in docker-compose.yml.
Found in export_result.sh where TEST_INJECTION_VALUE is defined as 'http://verification-test:9999' and used to dynamically test the nginx template generation.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic project directory located at '/home/ga/proxy-refactor'. The goal is to refactor an nginx config to use the environment variable 'BACKEND_URL'. The verification process dynamically injects the value 'http://verification-test:9999' to test if the template processing works correctly.
